destinations.evidence: Downstream commit 78d92c570692 removed the former AsyncDetectionService and node startup now documents that async system transactions are handled synchronously in TxPool::on_canonical_state_change. The v2.2 port likewise has no async detection service startup task.
destinations.snippet: No async detection service construction or critical task registration is present in EthereumAddOns::launch_add_ons.

equivalence_argument: Stale gap: the older service-criticality invariant from f28470bdc1cd was superseded by downstream commit 78d92c570692, which removed AsyncDetectionService entirely. The port matches the current downstream startup shape by not spawning a background async detection service.

related_but_insufficient_code: Downstream f28470bdc1cd briefly required a critical async detection service task.
Downstream 78d92c570692 later removed AsyncDetectionService and the critical task registration.
The v2.2.0 port has txpool canonical async side effects but no background async detection service.

notes: Stale/superseded: the critical-service requirement was replaced by downstream no-background-service startup behavior.
rationale: Changing spawn to spawn_critical in f28470bdc1cd briefly changed supervision of the former async detection service, but 78d92c570692 removed that service entirely and moved async system transaction handling into txpool canonical-state processing. The load-bearing current fact is that node startup should not spawn the former background service.
statement: The older requirement to spawn `AsyncDetectionService` as a critical task named "async detection service" was superseded when the service was removed; current node startup must not spawn that former background service.
suggested_falsification_tests: Start a node with a task executor that records critical tasks and assert no task named "async detection service" is spawned.
summary: The critical async detection service gap is stale; current downstream and the port do not spawn the former background service.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Node startup task-registration test asserting no task named "async detection service" is spawned.
title: Former async detection service criticality was superseded
